ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer who created the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game is available */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Initial release date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the algorithm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game version */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number of the game version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL for downloading the game version */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the game version in MB */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number in the experiment */,
  "exp" REAL /* Experimental result */,
  "log_exp" REAL /* Logarithmic experimental result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second during the experiment */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage during the experiment */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB during the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm configuration */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters and settings for the configuration */,
  "optimization_level" TEXT /* Level of optimization */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact on performance */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_configurations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, game developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
